mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_REQ_IDX, APPLY_ID, MEMBER_KEY, APPLY_NAME, APPLY_PHONE, APPLY_DESC, APPLY_STATUS , ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY FACILITY_REQ_IDX ASC

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, FACILITY_IDX, FACILITY_REQ_IDX, APPLY_ID, MEMBER_KEY, APPLY_NAME, APPLY_PHONE, APPLY_DESC, APPLY_STATUS , ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, BLACKBOARD_USE_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = FACILITY_REQ.HOMEPAGE_ID AND MEMBER_KEY = FACILITY_REQ.MEMBER_KEY AND INSTR(BLACK_TYPE, '30') != 0) as isBlackList, DESIRED_START_TIME,DESIRED_END_TIME, USER_APLLY_COUNT FROM FACILITY_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND FACILITY_IDX = #{facility_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY FACILITY_REQ_IDX ASC

SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.FACILITY_IDX, A.FACILITY_REQ_IDX, A.APPLY_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE(A.APPLY_NAME, '.', '*', 2) AS MASKING_NAME, A.APPLY_PHONE, A.APPLY_STATUS, B.FACILITY_NAME, B.USE_DATE, A.BLACKBOARD_USE_YN FROM FACILITY_REQ A, FACILITY_MANAGE B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.APPLY_STATUS = '2'
AND #{plan_date} = substr(B.USE_DATE,1,7)

SELECT a.FACILITY_NAME, a.USE_DATE, b.APPLY_ID, b.APPLY_NAME, b.APPLY_PHONE, b.APPLY_DESC, CASE WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '1' THEN '신청' WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '2' THEN '승인' WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '3' THEN '취소' END AS APPLY_STATUS FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a, FACILITY_REQ b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.FACILITY_IDX = b.FACILITY_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND b.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND a.USE_DATE like #{plan_date}||'%'
ORDER BY a.USE_DATE

SELECT b.HOMEPAGE_ID, b.FACILITY_IDX, b.FACILITY_REQ_IDX, a.FACILITY_NAME, a.USE_DATE, a.START_TIME, a.END_TIME, b.APPLY_NAME, b.APPLY_PHONE, b.APPLY_DESC,b.DESIRED_START_TIME,b.DESIRED_END_TIME,b.USER_APLLY_COUNT, a.BLACKBOARD_USE_YN, CASE WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '1' THEN '신청' WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '2' THEN '승인' WHEN b.APPLY_STATUS = '3' THEN '취소' END AS APPLY_STATUS FROM FACILITY_MANAGE a, FACILITY_REQ b WHERE a.HOMEPAGE_ID = b.HOMEPAGE_ID AND a.FACILITY_IDX = b.FACILITY_IDX AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND b.MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND a.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND b.DELETE_YN = 'N'

SELECT A.HOMEPAGE_ID, A.FACILITY_IDX, A.FACILITY_REQ_IDX, A.APPLY_NAME, REGEXP_REPLACE(A.APPLY_NAME, '.', '*', 2) AS MASKING_NAME, A.APPLY_PHONE, A.APPLY_STATUS, B.FACILITY_NAME, B.USE_DATE, A.BLACKBOARD_USE_YN FROM FACILITY_REQ A, FACILITY_MANAGE B WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.FACILITY_IDX = B.FACILITY_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N' AND A.APPLY_STATUS = '2' AND B.USE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND B.USE_DATE < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
